constants.bybitManualTitle: How to get a Bybit API key

bybitManualSteps.step1: Go to Bybit (bybit.com) and log in to your account.
bybitManualSteps.step3: Click "Create New Key" → select "System-Generated API Keys".
bybitManualSteps.step4: Set a name (e.g., "Trading Diary"), enable "Read" permissions for: "Trade" and "Wallet" sections.
bybitManualSteps.step5: Add your IP address or leave unrestricted (less secure).
bybitManualSteps.step6: Save the API key and secret — the secret is shown only once.

constants.kucoinPassphrasePlaceholder: Enter the passphrase you set when creating the API key
constants.kucoinPassphraseHelp: The passphrase you created during API key setup
constants.kucoinManualTitle: How to get a KuCoin API key

kucoinManualSteps.step1: Go to KuCoin (kucoin.com) and log in to your account.
kucoinManualSteps.step3: Click "Create API" and set a name (e.g., "Trading Diary").
kucoinManualSteps.step4: Set a passphrase — remember it, you will need it for connection.
kucoinManualSteps.step5: Enable "General" and "Trade" permissions with read-only access.
kucoinManualSteps.step6: Save the API key, secret, and passphrase — the secret is shown only once.

constants.finamManualTitle: How to get the Finam API token
constants.tInvestManualTitle: How to get the T-Investments API token

tInvestManualSteps.step1: Open the T-Investments app or go to www.tbank.ru/invest
tInvestManualSteps.step2: Navigate to Settings → Issue tokens (or the developer portal: tbank.ru/invest/settings/)
tInvestManualSteps.step5: Copy the generated token and paste it in the field above

finamManualSteps.step1: Go to the Finam Trade API portal: tradeapi.finam.ru (accessible from Finam personal cabinet → Trade API section).
finamManualSteps.step2: Log in with your Finam credentials (confirm 2FA if enabled). Open the "Tokens" section.
finamManualSteps.step4: Enter a descriptive token name — e.g., "Token for Finam Diary".
finamManualSteps.step6: Select the brokerage account(s) to expose via the API.
finamManualSteps.step7: Set access rights to "read-only" to prevent order placement via this token.
finamManualSteps.step8: Save — the system will display the secret API token.
finamManualSteps.step9: Copy it immediately: it may only be partially visible later.
finamManualSteps.step10: Paste this secret into the "API token" field in the previous step.

constants.finamHowToDoDesc: Open the tradeapi.finam.ru portal and follow the full 9-step instruction
constants.finamNotClientDesc: Open an account on finam.ru and invest from a single account on Moscow and SPB exchanges
constants.tInvestHowToDoDesc: Open investment settings in the T-Bank app and create a token
constants.tInvestNotClientDesc: Open a brokerage account with T-Bank and start investing
constants.bybitHowToDoDesc: Open API settings in your Bybit account and create an API key
constants.bybitNotClientDesc: Register on Bybit and start trading
